rules.description: Primary palette: Electric Blue #0066FF (60%), Volt Green #AAFF00 (20%), Carbon Black #1A1A1A (15%), Pure White #FFFFFF (5%). Blue dominates hero sections; green for CTAs and accents only.
Headlines: Montserrat Bold 28px minimum. Subheads: Montserrat SemiBold 20px. Body: Source Sans Pro Regular 16px minimum (14px absolute floor). Never use serif fonts.
Horizontal lockup only. Minimum 32px clear space around logo (48px preferred on hero sections). Never place on busy backgrounds or over athlete faces.
Voice is energetic, aspirational, and inclusive. Celebrate personal progress over competition. Never use aggressive, exclusive, or body-shaming language.
Feature real athletes in natural movement. Diversity in body types, ethnicities, and abilities is required. Golden hour lighting preferred. No stock photos or static product-only shots.
Dynamic transitions with 0.3s maximum cut duration. Kinetic typography for key messages. First 2 seconds must show movement; product reveal by second 5.

Action-oriented CTAs that inspire without pressuring. Approved: 'Push Your Limits', 'Move with Purpose', 'Start Your Journey', 'Own the Moment'. Prohibited: 'Buy Now', 'Don't Miss Out', 'Crush the Competition'.
Upbeat 120-140 BPM tracks. Electronic/indie crossover preferred. Fade-in over 0.5s. Voiceover in conversational tone. No heavy bass drops or aggressive EDM.

voice.sentence_style: Short, punchy sentences. Active voice. Second person ('you') to create direct connection.
